mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('BORROWING', 'OVERDUE') AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 'BORROWING' AND due_date < NOW() AND deleted = 0

SELECT br.*, u.username AS join_username, b.title AS join_book_title, b.isbn AS join_book_isbn FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.id = #{id}
